character.name: 2D retro pixel art character sprite sheet of a muscular Indian police officer inspired by a Bollywood action hero, thick mustache, khaki police uniform, blue police cap, strong body build, side-view fighting stance, detailed 16-bit arcade game style, clean pixel shading, fighting game animation frames.
